hero.title: Legal Employment in Belarus
hero.desc: We guarantee 100% legal employment without risks or hidden fees. We handle all paperwork, work visas, and local adaptation — providing complete, end-to-end employment solutions within 30-40 days.

countries.title: Countries We Recruit From
countries.desc: We officially partner with leading international recruitment agencies and accept candidates from the following countries, providing full visa support and seamless local coordination.

professions.title: In-Demand Professions
professions.videoRequirement: Video confirmation of skills is required for each specialty. Every worker must send a high-quality video demonstrating their work directly from their workplace or production site.

masseuse.title: Masseuses (Spa & Wellness)
masseuse.desc: We are actively recruiting professional female masseuses for top-tier spas and wellness centers in Belarus. Candidates must provide video confirmation of their skills.

services.title: Our Services
services.desc: Comprehensive legal and organizational support for labor migration to the Republic of Belarus.

b2b.title: For Recruitment Agencies
b2b.subtitle: (B2B Partnership)
list: Processing work invitations for your candidates

b2c.title: For Job Seekers
b2c.subtitle: (Employment)
list: Consultation on job selection and legal status
Processing of work permit (for 1 year, extendable)
Assistance with medical examinations and obtaining a Tax ID
Protection of labor rights in the Republic of Belarus

steps.title: APPLICATION
steps.desc: You submit an application, provide your passport and resume (work experience details)

steps.title: INTERVIEW
steps.desc: We conduct a video interview, assess your skills, and offer a vacancy with salary details

steps.title: PAPERWORK & VISA
steps.desc: We process an official work invitation and help you obtain a work visa in your country

steps.title: ARRIVAL IN BELARUS
steps.desc: You arrive in Minsk. We meet you at the airport, arrange transfer, and check you into housing

steps.title: LEGALIZATION
steps.desc: We help you pass a medical exam, get temporary registration, and a 1-year work permit

steps.title: WORK & SUPPORT
steps.desc: You start working. We stay in touch and protect your rights throughout the entire contract

about.title: Why Choose Us?
about.desc1: We understand how important it is for partner agencies to be confident in the safety of their candidates, and for job seekers to get a reliable job. Our mission is to make the relocation and employment process as transparent and fast as possible. We process documents strictly in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Belarus, catering directly to candidates from Nigeria, including Lagos and Abuja.
about.desc2: We handle all bureaucratic procedures with the Department of Citizenship and Migration in Belarus.

features.title: 100% Legal
features.desc: All documents are processed in strict accordance with the Law of the Republic of Belarus. No grey schemes.

features.title: Time Saving
features.desc: We take care of all the paperwork and interactions with migration services. You just receive the ready invitation.

features.title: Risk Protection
features.desc: We guarantee employment with verified employers. We eliminate the risks of deportation and fines.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything partners and candidates need to know.

list.q: Which professions are in highest demand?
list.a: There is a high demand in Belarus for construction workers (masons, carpenters, concrete workers), agricultural workers, and manufacturing/warehouse staff.

list.q: Who pays for the candidate's flight?
list.a: Flights and consular fees are usually paid by the candidate or the sending agency. The Belarusian employer pays for the processing of permits within the country.
Employers provide dormitories that meet all sanitary standards. We personally monitor the living conditions and help candidates adapt.

list.q: How fast is the work invitation processed?
list.a: On average, the process of issuing a work permit and a special invitation takes 3 to 5 weeks from the moment the full package of documents is submitted.
